race.comment: BOULEVARD BOY (1) scored two runs back then was well in commission last time but could only manage to finish fifth over 1200m at Cunnamulla after he was prominent at the bend. Good enough to play a major role. REVANTAS (4) broke his maiden last start over 1000m at Gayndah, scoring by a long neck. Re-unites with Paul Hamblin who was on board last start. Tougher assignment this time but is one of the main contenders. LAID BACK BON (8) The change in gear did the trick when she ran on strongly to record her maiden win at Injune last time over 1000m at the first run back from a break. Fitter and a threat. STARTLING CAT (5) ran a better race last start to finish third at Cunnamulla over 1200m. Has claims.
